languages.text: {n}Губернатор удивленно улыбается.{/n} "Знать не знал, что вы так{mf|ой|ая}... Поймете нас. Спасибо! У нас как говорят: когда комиссар под руку не лезет, и работается легче". {n}Он осекается.{/n} "Не то, что вы комиссар, конечно! Нет".

traits.locale_text: {n}Губернатор удивленно улыбается. {/n}"Знать не знал, что вы так{mf|ой|ая}... Поймете нас. Спасибо! У нас как говорят: когда комиссар под руку не лезет, и работается легче". {n}Он осекается. {/n}"Не то, что вы комиссар, конечно! Нет".

languages.text: {n}The governor smiles with relief.{/n} "I never thought you'd be so... understanding. Thank you! As they say around here: work is easier when you don't have a Commissar in your way." {n}He stops short.{/n} "Not that you are a Commissar of course not, no."
languages.original_text: {n}Губернатор удивленно улыбается.{/n} "Знать не знал, что вы так{mf|ой|ая}... Поймете нас. Спасибо! У нас как говорят: когда комиссар под руку не лезет, и работается легче". {n}Он осекается.{/n} "Не то, что вы комиссар, конечно! Нет".

traits.locale_text: {n}The governor smiles with surprise.{/n} "I never knew you were so... understanding. Thank you! As they say around here: the work is easier when you don't have a Commissar hovering over you." {n}He stops short.{/n} "Not that you are a Commissar, of course! Not at all."

{n}The governor smiles with surprise.{/n} "I never knew you were so... understanding. Thank you! As they say around here: the work is easier when you don't have a Commissar hovering over you." {n}He stops short.{/n} "Not that you are a Commissar, of course! Not at all."

{n}The governor smiles with relief.{/n} "I never thought you'd be so... understanding. Thank you! As they say around here: work is easier when you don't have a commissar in your way." {n}He stops short.{/n} "Not that you are a commissar of course not, no."

{n}The governor smiles with relief.{/n} "I never thought you'd be so... understanding. Thank you! As they say around here: work is easier when you don't have a commissar in your way." {n}He stops short.{/n} "Not that you are a commissar of course not, no."

languages.text: {n}总督如释重负地笑了。{/n}“真没想到您会这么……通情达理。谢谢您！用这儿的话说就是，没了政委碍手碍脚，干活就轻松多了。”{n}他猛地顿住。{/n}“我不是说您是政委，绝对不是。”
languages.original_text: {n}The governor smiles with relief.{/n} "I never thought you'd be so... understanding. Thank you! As they say around here: work is easier when you don't have a commissar in your way." {n}He stops short.{/n} "Not that you are a commissar of course not, no."

traits.locale_text: {n}总督如释重负地笑了。{/n}“真没想到您会这么……通情达理。谢谢您！用这儿的话说就是，没了政委碍手碍脚，干活就轻松多了。”{n}他猛地顿住。{/n}“我不是说您是政委，绝对不是。”

languages.text: {n}Vali rahatlayarak gülümsüyor.{/n} "Bu kadar... Anlayışlı olacağınızı hiç düşünmemiştim. Teşekkür ederim! Buralarda dedikleri gibi... Yoluna çıkan bir komiser olmadığında işler daha kolay yürür." {n}Aniden duraksıyor.{/n} "Tabii sizin komiser olduğunuzu kastetmiyorum, yanlış anlamayın."
languages.original_text: {n}The governor smiles with relief.{/n} "I never thought you'd be so... understanding. Thank you! As they say around here: work is easier when you don't have a commissar in your way." {n}He stops short.{/n} "Not that you are a commissar of course not, no."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vali rahatlayarak gülümsüyor.{/n} "Bu kadar... Anlayışlı olacağınızı hiç düşünmemiştim. Teşekkür ederim! Buralarda dedikleri gibi... Yoluna çıkan bir komiser olmadığında işler daha kolay yürür." {n}Aniden duraksıyor.{/n} "Tabii sizin komiser olduğunuzu kastetmiyorum, yanlış anlamayın."

languages.text: {n}Soulagé, le gouverneur vous répond en souriant.{/n} « Je n'aurais jamais cru que vous vous montreriez aussi... {mf|compréhensif|compréhensive}. Merci beaucoup ! On travaille plus facilement quand on n'a pas un commissaire dans les pattes, comme on dit chez nous. » {n}Il s'interrompt subitement.{/n} « Pas que je vous compare à un commissaire, hein. Surtout pas. »
languages.original_text: {n}The governor smiles with relief.{/n} "I never thought you'd be so... understanding. Thank you! As they say around here: work is easier when you don't have a commissar in your way." {n}He stops short.{/n} "Not that you are a commissar of course not, no."

traits.locale_text: {n}Soulagé, le gouverneur vous répond en souriant.{/n} « Je n'aurais jamais cru que vous vous montreriez aussi... {mf|compréhensif|compréhensive}. Merci beaucoup ! On travaille plus facilement quand on n'a pas un commissaire dans les pattes, comme on dit chez nous. » {n}Il s'interrompt subitement.{/n} « Pas que je vous compare à un commissaire, hein. Surtout pas. »

languages.text: {n}El gobernador sonríe, aliviado.{/n} «No pensaba que fuera tan... comprensiv{mf|o|a}. ¡Gracias! Como dicen aquí, es más fácil trabajar sin un comisario interfiriendo». {n}Se detiene.{/n} «Aunque usted de comisari{mf|o|a} no tiene nada, no.».
languages.original_text: {n}The governor smiles with relief.{/n} "I never thought you'd be so... understanding. Thank you! As they say around here: work is easier when you don't have a commissar in your way." {n}He stops short.{/n} "Not that you are a commissar of course not, no."

traits.locale_text: {n}El gobernador sonríe, aliviado.{/n} «No pensaba que fuera tan... comprensiv{mf|o|a}. ¡Gracias! Como dicen aquí, es más fácil trabajar sin un comisario interfiriendo». {n}Se detiene.{/n} «Aunque usted de comisari{mf|o|a} no tiene nada, no.».

languages.text: {n}Der Gouverneur lächelt erleichtert.{/n} "Ich hätte nie gedacht, dass Ihr so ... verständnisvoll seid. Danke! Oder wie wir hier sagen: Es lässt sich leichter arbeiten, wenn kein Kommissar im Weg steht." {n}Er hält kurz inne.{/n} "Nicht, dass Ihr ein Kommissar wärt, nein, ganz und gar nicht."
languages.original_text: {n}The governor smiles with relief.{/n} "I never thought you'd be so... understanding. Thank you! As they say around here: work is easier when you don't have a commissar in your way." {n}He stops short.{/n} "Not that you are a commissar of course not, no."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Gouverneur lächelt erleichtert.{/n} "Ich hätte nie gedacht, dass Ihr so ... verständnisvoll seid. Danke! Oder wie wir hier sagen: Es lässt sich leichter arbeiten, wenn kein Kommissar im Weg steht." {n}Er hält kurz inne.{/n} "Nicht, dass Ihr ein Kommissar wärt, nein, ganz und gar nicht."

languages.text: {n}知事は安堵の笑みを浮かべる.{/n}「まさか君がこんなに…理解してくれるとは。ありがとう！ここらでは言うように、邪魔な党員がいなければ仕事は楽だ。」{n}彼は立ち止まる.{/n}「もちろん君が党員だなんて…思わないよ。」
languages.original_text: {n}The governor smiles with relief.{/n} "I never thought you'd be so... understanding. Thank you! As they say around here: work is easier when you don't have a commissar in your way." {n}He stops short.{/n} "Not that you are a commissar of course not, no."

traits.locale_text: {n}知事は安堵の笑みを浮かべる.{/n}「まさか君がこんなに…理解してくれるとは。ありがとう！ここらでは言うように、邪魔な党員がいなければ仕事は楽だ。」{n}彼は立ち止まる.{/n}「もちろん君が党員だなんて…思わないよ。」
